name: John C. Hitt Library
description: The main library at UCF with multiple quiet study floors, group study rooms, and reliable Wi-Fi throughout the building. It is one of the most popular study locations on campus, especially during midterms and finals.

name: UCF Tech Commons
description: A collaborative workspace inside the UCF library with computers, charging stations, and flexible seating. Students often use this space for group projects, coding, and technical work.

name: Foxtail Coffee Co (University)
description: A popular coffee shop near UCF known for its specialty drinks and relaxed study environment. Many students come here for long study sessions thanks to the large tables and consistent Wi-Fi.

name: Snowbean
description: A modern dessert and boba cafe popular with UCF students for late evening study sessions. The space has a relaxed atmosphere and is often used for casual studying or small group work.

name: Kung Fu Tea UCF
description: A busy boba tea shop near UCF with plenty of seating and a lively atmosphere. Students often study here while grabbing drinks and snacks between classes.

name: Qreate Coffee
description: A sleek coffee shop near campus known for its minimalist design and strong espresso drinks. It attracts many students looking for a quieter environment for focused studying.

name: Vespr Coffee Bar
description: A stylish coffee bar in the Waterford Lakes area that offers a calm atmosphere and high-quality coffee. Students often visit for quieter study sessions away from the busy campus environment.

name: Light on the Sugar
description: A modern dessert cafe known for Asian-style pastries and drinks. Many UCF students stop here to study or work on laptops while enjoying desserts and tea.

name: Panera Bread (University Blvd)
description: A casual cafe with reliable Wi-Fi, comfortable seating, and plenty of outlets. It is a dependable option for long individual study sessions or small group meetings.

name: Starbucks (University Blvd)
description: A busy Starbucks location close to UCF that many students use as a quick study stop. Seating fills up quickly during peak hours but the environment works well for short study sessions.

name: Lineage Coffee Roasting
description: One of Orlando’s most respected specialty coffee shops with a calm atmosphere and excellent coffee. It attracts many remote workers and students looking for a focused study environment.

name: Stardust Video & Coffee
description: A unique coffee shop and vintage video store hybrid with an artsy and relaxed vibe. It is popular among students and creatives looking for a comfortable place to read or study.

name: Orlando Public Library
description: The main branch of the Orange County Library System with large quiet reading areas and study desks. It is a great off-campus option for focused studying in a traditional library environment.

name: Barnes & Noble (Waterford Lakes)
description: A large bookstore with a cafe and comfortable seating areas. Many students spend long study sessions here thanks to the quiet atmosphere and available Wi-Fi.

name: Curriculum Materials Center (UCF)
description: A quieter library space within UCF that is often overlooked by students. It provides a calm environment for reading, writing, and individual studying.
